reviews.review_text: We wish to thank the public for your kind reviews between 1.10.22 and 24.4.26.Our intention was to provide a safe,clean, friendly park. Please note Mark and Lauren have now retired effective 24/4/26. Kind regards Mark
We had an unpowered site. The park is lovely: clean, well-presented and well-maintained. It was obvious the managers take great pride in the presentation of the facilities.

We stayed 2 nights at the park. Both Mark and Lauren were so friendly and accomodating. The site itself is beautifully kept and clean. Great clean ammenities. You can tell Mark, Lauren, and others who work within the park take great pride in what they do.
Lovely view of the lake with lots of kangaroos coming through of a morning/evening.
Would 100% stay here again
Large camping sites, great showers and laundry room. There is a small nice pool but no playground for kids. The kitchen is nice and the staff were helpful.

Such a lovely campsite in a beautiful area. Nice flat grass pitches with plenty of space between sites. Hands down the cleanest campsite I’ve ever stayed at, hats off to the cleaner! The staff were lovely. Sad to be leaving but I’m sure I’ll be back.

Such a quiet and lovely spot to relax while visiting Merimbula! Everything is super clean, and the camp kitchen is really handy. The common area is great too, with a TV, books, and WiFi which is a big plus.
The staff are so kind and welcoming and the sites are nice and spacious so you can really enjoy your own space. Lots of animals around as well, including kangaroos.
Had such a peaceful stay here, would definitely recommend 🥰

We enjoyed three nights at this lovely CP with large, grassy sites, immaculate amenities, lots of wildlife and very friendly manager/owner. It is very close to Pambula and also Merimbula. The perfect spot to explore this part of the Sapphire coast. Definitely recommend this CP and we’ll be back for sure!
Peaceful resting place

Travelling Aussies 🇦🇺

We absolutely loved our stay at this rural caravan park

Rolling green pastures, mobs of grey kangaroos and flocks of friendly ducks helped make this stay feel close to nature

The managers are fantastic, facilities are in great shape and maintained in a spotless condition 🏆

Just a short drive to the conveniences of Merimbula township but in relaxing peace & quiet

We’d unreservedly recommend staying at this great park to everyone travelling the Princess Highway
Very well maintained and impeccably clean campground with with even and spacious lots, great amenities - especially the kitchen - and at a very fair price 👌Can't wait to stay there again.

Great park to enjoy. Camped in our caravan on a beautiful powered grass site. Large level sites and spaces between caravaners to enjoy the acreage and distant views.
Ground are well kept and amenities very clean.
About 15 minutes south of Merimbula and just out of Pambula.
Kangaroos and ducks like to visit.
Wifi very good at any site.
Highly recommend.

We stayed for the Australia weekend at the caravan park. The owners were very helpful and friendly. The park is clean and peaceful, perfect spot for a lovely walk to the lake or in a short drive to Pambula, Merimbula or further to Eden.
We will be back and would recommend to anyone , who needs a restful holiday.

I would 100% recommend this as a place for camping! The amenities was clean and tidy with plenty of appliances to use. There was always someone around to help out with anything needed and there was constant upkeep happening of the grounds to ensure it is clean. Highly recommend this spot!
Great location just outside the hustle and bustle of both Merimbula and Pambula - but close enough to drive into town for shopping and a feed
Great park, top location, friendly staff, clean amenities
Price was great would definitely stay again

We had a lovely stay at this caravan park and really enjoyed our January time there🌲. It’s close to several beautiful beaches, perfect for walking with our two lovely dogs🐾. The park is pet-friendly (dogs on leash), which made our stay even better😊. We stayed for two days and found it very relaxing. Our powered concrete site was great and very convenient. There’s also a swimming pool, which was great for cooling off on hot days. Would happily stay again🌻

We had a wonderful stay here over the Xmas period with a few other families. All of our sites were together.
The sites are large, flat and grassy which is a huge bonus. The amenities were modern, clean and tidy. The park is clearly maintained well and the team take great pride in presenting it well. The location was perfect.
3-4min drive into Pambula and 10 mins to Merimbula. Lovely and quiet being this distance away. The only tiny issue we had was the showers were a bit cold and dribbly if all were being used at once but it didn’t bother us enough to lower our rating. The staff are super friendly

Great little caravan park. Nice and quiet, you feel like you’re in nature, sites are big especially compared to the bigger parks, people are friendly and it’s an easy drive to all the main attractions. Highly recommend.
Spotlessly clean, very well looked after park, warm welcome, great wifi, very good camp kitchen with TV, pool, quiet, lake setting. Restorative.
Lovely owners, thank you!
Sehr sauberer und ordentlicher Platz, sehr ebene Stellplätze, Zugang zum See fußläufig erreichbar, viele Kängurus und Vögel zu beobachten, schöner Pool und tolle Campingkitchen

Everything was perfect. Having a small RV that I never plug into power, it was great to have the option of a lush grassy unpowered area, close to a very comfortable and weather-protected camp kitchen/eating/TV viewing facility.
Showers and toilets were immaculately clean with much-appreciated curtains to keep your clothes dry while showering. This dog-friendly peaceful campground has a lovely open countryside outlook and you can follow a trail to view the lake. An abundance of wildlife was all around so dogs need to be leashed and under control.
The pool area looked very clean, tidy and inviting. The purpose-built residential chalets on one side of the grounds were beautifully kept and added to the attractiveness of the holiday park. The managers were very friendly and helpful.
Being only a few minutes from Merimbula and Pambula, I will definitely book in again when I'm in this part of NSW.
Jude
Loved it!

Rooms - in context we had a powered site for our camp trailer. Sites had great space and were clearly and easily marked. Sites were also very well grassed and very flat (always good for a van or a tent!). Had some rain, heavy at times but the park seemed to just absorb it in no time. Good night lighting but not obtrusive. Very nice amenities and camp kitchen, kept spotless.
Service - Excellent and very helpful. As just one example they needed to turn water off for maintenance for a while, and informed us via text in plenty of time and kept us well informed.
Location - So close to everything Sapphire Coast has to offer, yet quiet, private tranquil and beautiful. Little to no road noise, only a very quick drive back into Merimbula or Pambula (like 5 minutes max!). Starry skies (well they don't control weather but...), wild kangaroos (big and scary in the dark but they hop away!), ducks, swamp hens, some lovely big trees, cockatiels, etc. Very relaxed atmosphere.
...and roo poo! Just try and stop your dog from tasting it or rolling in it!

Great location, short drive to coastal towns. Sites are large, fitted our 9m motorhome and tow car (unhitched) with room to spare. Views of the Lake in the distance and Kangaroos and birdlike to watch. Good laundry. Great quiet place, highly recommend

Great place wonderful people who run the park,we were given the best spot in park,many thanks Mark Lauren and Kylie.Amenities were spotless,so peaceful will definitely come back again. Six star rating

Amenities and facilities are very clean and clearly well maintained. Showers are great size, water pressure is amazing and hot water is great. Dog friendly. Pool on site. If you want a peaceful location this is it. Location is perfectly situated between Merimbula and Pembula.

Lovely campsite, the facilities were clean and well maintained. Loads of kangaroos all around which was exciting! Easy drive to some really nice restaurants and the beach. Couldn’t want for much more really! We stayed in a tent.
Really nice holiday park. Nice scenery, really good unpowered sites, fair prices, good amenities and dog friendly. Wifi worked. Would reccomend.

What a gem. Very clean, extremely well maintained, peaceful and tranquil setting. The manager Mark was very helpful, and I would not hesitate in recommending this Caravan Park to anyone. Well done, and my wife and I will definitely be back.

Excellent Excellent Excellent. Very well priced pet friendly caravan park. Facilities are super clean and the hot showers are super hot with great water pressure. Mark the manager is a super chilled out happy person willing to help out and answer all queries. Access to lake Merimbula if you enjoy your kayaking and fishing. Very peaceful pet friendly park with no noisy kids or frumpy neighbours. I definitely be back

Stayed 4 nights in a caravan on a powered site,  one of the best caravan parks around.
Have been here before and will definitely be back.
Absolutely love this place

A fantastic holiday park. Clean and well maintained.
Well managed and very professional.
Will definitely be staying here again.

Merimbula Lake Holiday Park offers a big, open camping area that’s perfect for relaxing in nature. The kitchen facilities were very clean and came in especially handy during the cold and rainy days—such a nice comfort! A great spot for a peaceful stay with all the essentials well taken care of.

Lovely spot to spend the night ! And some kangaroos 🦘
Really clean amenities and friendly staff :)

This holiday park was so green and peaceful, just what I needed.  Kangaroos were everywhere, which was awesome!  Seriously,  I saw tons of them hopping around.  It was such a relaxing getaway.  Highly recommend for a nature escape!

This campsite is great! Big grassy camp spots and all the facilities are amazing. The owners are lovely and gave us a spot after hours. So well priced as well! Perfect camp spot for exploring the surrounding areas. Thank you!

Caravan if was perfect
Lovely peaceful surroundings and very clean amenities
Very efficient and friendly staff
Highly recommend
Great well maintained caravan park. Clean amenities. Nice easy quiet location.

Spotless facilities
Great camp kitchen
Friendly helpful owners
Kangaroos everywhere

Good caravan park. We had a powered site which are very level, grassed and with a concrete slab. Amenities are very clean and good condition. Has a pool. Park is located on very nice grounds but a little far from the town and beach
Clean, quiet and friendly. I wish we had know there was no actual lake access for swimming, no walking tracks and noting within walking distance nearby though.
Great amenities that are very well kept and clean! Staff are friendly and very helpful. Our favourite place to stay on the Sapphire Coast, highly recommend!

Lovely well maintained Caravan Park.  We enjoyed our 3 day stay.  Had a large grassed site, the amenities were very clean , didn’t use the camp kitchen but it looked well set out.  Had kangaroos visit later in the day and ducks walking around in the mornings.  Great location only a short drive into Merimbula and Pambula.  Would recommend a stay here the price was very reasonable 😊👍🏼

We loved our stay at Merimbula Lakes!! Wonderful, well kept facilities, friendly people and amazing wildlife just a short walk away! Good showers, clean toilets, what else could you ask for? The grounds were beautiful! Can't wait to go back!

Park manager, Mark, was able to help us out with a last minute tent site. It was a beautiful site with great views & a mob of kangaroos to wake up to in the morning. Facilities were very clean. Camp kitchen was great with several kettles, toasters, a microwave, hot plate and oven, fridges and bbq. There is even spare plates, cooking utensils and cutlery. Our overnight stay here has been 5 star. It’s only a 5 minute drive to town. We will definitely be back!

HIGHLY RECOMMEND

We stayed for 4 nights over the 2024/25 New Year period. We used the park as base camp to explore the national parks surrounding Merimbula and Eden.

The park is on large parcel of land however the bookable space limited making it perfect for those who love to stay away from hussle and bussle of large, busy caravan parks. The Owners are friendly and always on-site if you need anything or just want to have a chat. The amenities are cleaned daily and the swimming pool and camp kitchen are top notch. The park is pet friendly (with rules) and has lots of kangaroos, ducks and other wildlife enjoying the surroundings. A private fishing spot is a short walk from the back end of the park which also allows for kayak/paddleboard etc entrance into the bay.

A perfect spot for a quiet couples getaway or family fun weekend.
Viel Platz, alles sauber und ordentlich, sehr freundliche Besitzer, ruhige Lage (Verkehr von Highway hörbar aber nicht störend), schöne Aussicht, unschlagbarer/fairer Preis!
Really lovely owners and great park facilities. We booked an uncovered site ans were given a powered site with a slab because there was rain due. Roos grazing throughout the park morning and evening
Great caravan park, has a swimming pool, basketball court, fab camp kitchen and a nice area for walks to the lake
Lovely, quiet, peaceful campsite next to a beautiful lake. Nice large and spacious sites with everything you need.

I have never seen such clean caravan park bathrooms, well maintained campgrounds and friendly service anywhere before here, and I travel regularly. I am very thankful for the hospitality and support I received during my stay here, while recovering from a massive accident. I can’t wait to make this a yearly trip. Thank you for your kindness
Great park friendly and cheerful checkin we had a grass powered sit which was perfectly level. Nice clean amenities and it was very quiet
Stayed in a camper, great amenities  staff were lovely. Beautiful setting full of wildlife.
Very friendly staff clean amenities stayed their one night would have stayed another night if there was no kangaroo shit all over the grounds

Cleanest facilities I've seen in all my travels.
Beautiful quiet park. Kangaroos everywhere.
Your old school caravan park.
Well worth a visit.
Hosts friendly and informative.

Such a nice place to stay. We stayed for 3 nights and it was amazing. Friendly staff, great views, close to town. We used it as our base camp to explore around the area. Amenities are clean and hot showers were bliss. Highly recommended for families and travellers alike. Check it out. The rates are very reasonable too.
Stay a couple of time's  great park will be back

This place was beautiful, very calm, quiet place to stay. The owners were very helpful and fairly priced for a powered site! the amenities were spotless!

We Will definitely return to this park!
Nice and clean, very friendly staff, beautiful view.  And close to everything we wanted to do.

Super camping! Le personnel est super accueillant. L'endroit est très calme et entouré d'animaux. Les parties communes sont propres.
Je vous conseille fortement cet endroit
We had a slab for our awning.  The caretakers were friendly.  Plenty of space. We had a beautiful outlook of the land beyond. Lovely wildlife
We went for camping . So the camps are ours. The location is awesome. The facilities like toilets, bath rooms, kitchen and swimming pools was beyond expected levels.
Large grass sites, very helpful management. Nice view of the lake. Short distance to Merimbula and Pambula
The park Manager is very welcoming.   Our grass powered site was a good size and in great condition with a lovely outlook.  A lovely park at a very reasonable price.

Got to say not what I expected, But a very quiet well kept little Caravan Park , You can see the Lake but not really on the lake , Grass everywhere, clean amenities and so quiet even though it is on the Highway, don’t let being out of town bother you , 3 is to Pambula 6 to Merimbula, but worth it , Big level sites👍

What a Lil piece of paradise... immaculate condition..awesome camp kitchen..wonderful grassy sites.. only 8 mins from merimbula beach... way better than the hustle and bustle and crazy expense of the caravan parks close to beach...

Cannot rate this beautiful park highly enough. Mark helped us get sorted by moving us to a site less susceptible to water on his own accord, due to rain that day/night. Very clean well stocked amenities. Deadset legends. Thanks again, we will be back!

Sitting in between merimbula and pambula is this lovely van park. Pet friendly and plenty of soacw to walk the pooch. Nice open spaces with wasy access. Clean amenities and lots of kangaroos to be seen. Will stay again.

This park is part residential and part caravan holiday makers. Everyone who either lives there permanently or holiday visits enjoy it . Neat and tidy. Good location. Lake views. Close to Pambula village.
Another gem along the Saphire Coast!

A great park, well spaced and serviced. Amenities are a little dated but VERY clean and so well maintained. We had a nice big grassy site with good spacing between neighbours. The site would have benefited from a sullage point, but otherwise really beautiful staying here !

Family have been Camping with our Havenese Dog in NSW, QLD and VIC. By far this is the best experience tent camping in Merimbula Lake Holiday Park.  Allocated lot is spacious/large area. Clean facilities and the Management/Manager ( Mark ) is so friendly and super flexible to adjust our check out time. Highly recommended. Thank you so much. Will be back for future Holidays.

This is such a nice, small and quiet spot. The owners are lovely and very accomodating, everything is maintained really well and it is close to town!
We have really enjoyed our stay!

Highly recommend Merrimbula Lkes Holiday Park, weather was against us all but Manager Mike and his Wife made us feel safe and welcome also updated us constantly on storm activity that helped greatly keeping safe and dry, facilities and camp kitchen ultra clean and well maintained.

We went with a group of six for a camping trip.  Mark was polite and helpful and didn't give us any hassles.  We made good use of the camp kitchen which was clean and well appointed.  The pool was beautiful.  This was our second time here and we'd be happy to go again.
Showers so good it's hard to have a cold one

A very pleasant, tidy and well-equipped caravan park. The sites are large, mostly drive-through with a pleasant rural outlook across to Lake Merimbula. The facilities are clean and well organised, including showers with ample hot water, a well-equipped kitchen and lounge, and a pool for cooling off in the warmer periods. Our stays there have been peaceful and quiet, clearly attracting a customer base of people who are respectful of others. The park is far enough out of town to be peaceful, but close enough to the facilities offered by Merimbula and Pambula. Thoroughly recommended.
Tranquil and quaint
Great quiet location, large sites, excellent amenities block and clean. Lots of wildlife and 15 minutes to Merimbula town centre, would stay again.

Central location to other towns, we went to Giiyong Festival. Short drive to Merimbula, Eden etc Great camp kitchen that was supplied with cooking equipment,tv, couches. Daughter enjoyed pool.  Generous plots

Such a beautiful spot to stay.|This park has quite a relaxing atmosphere.|Very clean ammenities and one of the best camp kitchens.|Big, wide spaces, plenty of room, lots of wild life and wonderful views of the lake.|Could not ask for better.|Mark and Lauren are very friendly and welcoming.

Great park , good camp kitchen, bit rough having to pay to use the bbq. Plenty of space , lots of roo’s running around( plenty of roo poo as well ) lol. Bit far out of town, but has a courtesy bus to town.  The driver was exceptionally good.

We were greeted by lovely owners who were very helpful with information about the area. We stayed in our own vans, the Amenities were lovely and clean, washing machine and dryers were great at $4 a load. |The camp kitchen was well equipped with pans, electric frypan, toaster, kettle, plus heaps more a BBQ outside to cook on and lovely and clean. There was a tv, table and chairs, fridge etc, so we cooked and ate our meals there. The owner came over and closed tgeroller door to keep the wind out which was well appreciated. |Totally recommend the Merrimbula Lake Big 4 Caravan park, it may have highway traffic going past but didnt disturb us at all

Quiet, clean, peaceful surroundings.
Management spot on.

I had a powered and slabbed  site for 3 nights I have to say I absolutely loved this place  so restful and spacious and relaxing I sat outside my van at 6 am each morning with my coffee and soaked in the cool calm view watching the kangaroos and early morning wildlife The amenities were spotless the pool was beautiful clean and refreshing I cannot speak highly enough of this place  I would look no further

The stay at this campsite was fantastic.  The owner was very friendly and uncomplicated.  We actually only wanted to stay 1 night, but ended up staying 3 nights.  Price-performance is perfect, location is quiet and beautiful, 7 minutes to the town.  Very clean sanitary facilities, kangaroos on the campsite.

Der Aufenthalt aud diesem Camping war fantastisch. der Besitzer war sehr freundlich und unkompliziert. Wir wollten eigentlich nur 1 Nacht bleiben, sind schlussendlich 3 Nächte geblieben. Preis-Leistung ist perfekt, Lokalisation ist ruhig und schön, 7min zum Städtchen. Sehr saubere Sanitäranlagen, Kangaroos auf dem Camping.

Immaculate park, great facilities, superb location. Lovely and peaceful. Only 10 mins to Merimbula and 5 mins to Pambula. Showers were great and plenty of cooking facilities in the amenities hut. Nice Swimming pool although weather was a bit to cold for this. Wouldn't hesitate to stay again

We really enjoyed our stay at Merimbula lake holiday park. The owners were very kind and helpful and Everything was very clean and well maintained. One of the nicest campsites we stayed at along the East coast, would highly recommend staying at Merimbula lake holiday park.

I had the pleasure of staying at merimbula lake holiday park for an extended stay.
The park is very tranquil and peaceful place, even in very busy times.
The staff and management work tirelessly to maintain a beautiful environment to relax and enjoy your stay.
The amenities are extremely clean all year round.
I recommend it for your next holiday or trip away.
Really east place to stay at, good facilities, would stay again
Powered van sites spacious and level, staff friendly and helpful, loos super clean. Will come again. Impressed.

We have been travelling  in our caravan  for  4 weeks up the East Coast. Merimbula  was our last  stop before  going  home to Bass Coast Victoria.  Of all the parks  , brand names as well, this was by far the  best  park. So much space  between sites, ( powered and unpowered) fabulous  views over Merimbula  Lake, amenities  were super clean, great swimming  pool area, camp kitchen  great.   Lovely to see  so many Roos grazing in the  area. Great helpful manager. Short drive  to Pambula village and fab beaches. Also Wheelers Restaurant, recommend a visit. Lastly the prices were excellent.
Definitely  be returning  and would  highly  recommend  to friends.  😊😊

A beautiful quite park that was immaculate in facilities and sites.
We only stayed overnight but will definitely be back for a longer stay!!
Highly recommend , we been travelling for 6years and this rates as the best.

The powered sites are all level & waterfront, it is a very quiet park with clean facilities, friendly helpful staff.We found it a central location for the south coast, this is our 2nd visit & we will definitely be back. Thanks Merimbula lake HP we had a wonderful time.
Lovely park, nice grassy sites, lots of space and very friendly owners, would definitely come again!
Excellent!!!

Great place right next to pambula 9 mins from merrimbula..
Friendly hosts, well looked after, we used a powered site, sites are big and well spaced..
Definitely will return!! We give it a thumbs up!!
Clean amenities and close to sites. Nice quiet location

I have been staying here for about seven years and it is the best park on the coast because its in a great location, quiet with some very nice permenant residents,  close to Pambula but not the Merimbula retirement village and convenient for my work with penguins in Eden.
Really enjoyable stay - very peaceful, large sites, clean amenities and welcoming host. Thank you. Will be back.

Friendly staff, clean amenities and only a short drive into the town of merimbula.
Highly recommend staying here with friends/family.
I will definitely visit again!

Beautiful spot to stay for a relaxing few days.
Wonderful views.
Plenty of space, so well maintained.
Lovely friendly staff.
Will definitely be back.
(Keep this park a secret)

Lots of open space. Mark the manager is also a traveller so he cares and knows to look after guests.

Flat open spaces. Fair price $35 powered.

We only stayed at this park for one night, we paid for two but were refused a refund for second night (offered a credit if we were ever in the area again). The reason for leaving the park was there is nothing at all to do, we travel in a motorhome the only way to get  anywhere was to walk along a extremly busy highway and with two dogs it's pretty dangerous. There are Kangeroos everywhere and their droppings cover the park, if you travel with dogs it's pretty intense for them and there is no where to walk them off lead.
Needs to be signage to the lake.
Very very quiet, amenities are old but clean, but too scared to use them late at night due to everywhere you turn there are roos.
Camping in a field might as well be in a free camp. Sorry but we won't be back.
Great spot, amazing showers, don’t forget to bring a firepit as they are mandatory but not provided

The people running this caravan park are so lovely and kind. The amenities are clean and tidy and the grounds are well maintained. So many kangaroos to watch in the evening. This was a super relaxing stay and if we pass back through we'd choose to stay here again in a heart beat!
Very nice and helpful staff, well maintained and we felt comfortable and looked after. Recommend highly.
